creator: tetrakispph3pd@gmail.com
text:
I attempted to build this package as a dependency of security/sudo, and it fails with the output below. I'm not sure how to address this.

====> Compressing man pages (compress-man)
===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)
===>  Installing for sssd-1.16.5_10
===>  Checking if sssd is already installed
===>   Registering installation for sssd-1.16.5_10
pkg-static: pkg_checksum_hash_sha256_file(read failed): Is a directory
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make[1]: stopped in /usr/ports/security/sssd
*** Error code 1

Stop.
make: stopped in /usr/ports/security/sssd

===>>> Installation of sssd-1.16.5_10 (security/sssd) failed
===>>> Aborting update
